claims.claim: Tagir Abdullaev is naturally the bigger fighter compared to Jefferson Nascimento.
claims.quote: Abdullaev is a local to the region. He also is the naturally bigger guy.

claims.claim: Jefferson Nascimento was dropped by a spinning elbow in his most recent fight.
claims.quote: Nascimento was dropped with a spinning elbow in his last fight

claims.claim: Jefferson Nascimento may be negatively impacted by fighting less than a month after his previous bout.
claims.quote: How is it going to affect him that he fought less than a month ago and now he's getting a fight across the world

claims.claim: Jefferson Nascimento is faster than Tagir Abdullaev.
claims.quote: I do think Nascimento is faster than him.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan has faced a significantly higher level of competition in his early UFC career compared to John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: Bekzat has had a very difficult early UFC matchmaking... Not the same level of threat as an Umar Nurmagomedov and Alexandr Topuria

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan has superior boxing skills compared to John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I think his boxing is superior to John Matsumoto.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan is faster than John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I think he's a step faster than John Matsumoto.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan has a wrestling advantage over John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I really favor Bekzat Almakhan in the wrestling, too.

claims.claim: John Matsumoto has an advantage in leg and body kicks over Bekzat Almakhan.
claims.quote: I would say Matsumoto might be a little snappier with the leg kicks and the body kicks

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan has faced a significantly higher level of competition in his early UFC career compared to John Matsumoto.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan possesses superior boxing skills compared to John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I think his boxing is superior to John Matsumoto.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan is faster than John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I think he's a step faster than John Matsumoto.

claims.claim: Bekzat Almakhan has a wrestling advantage over John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: I really favor Bekzat Almakhan in the wrestling, too.

claims.claim: John Matsumoto has a slight advantage in leg and body kicks over Bekzat Almakhan.
claims.quote: I would say Matsumoto might be a little snappier with the leg kicks and the body kicks

claims.claim: John Matsumoto's Muay Thai-heavy style creates inefficiencies and flaws in his stand-up for higher-level MMA.
claims.quote: Matsumoto in the fight prior kind of stuck in his Muay Thai ways, which I think is inefficient for higher-level MMA.

claims.claim: Danil Donchenko blends Muay Thai with MMA more effectively than John Matsumoto.
claims.quote: Everything you like about Muay Thai in MMA because he blends it well with mixed martial arts as opposed to like Matsumoto

claims.claim: Theodor Børg Gran has never been knocked out as a professional fighter.
claims.quote: He's never been knocked out as a pro

claims.claim: Theodor Børg Gran has not previously faced a striker as violent as Danil Donchenko.
claims.quote: he's also never fought a violent striker like this. I mean, this is a rather serious jump in uh competition.

claims.claim: Danil Donchenko blends Muay Thai well with mixed martial arts, unlike Matsumoto who is stuck in his Muay Thai ways.
claims.quote: Everything you like about Muay Thai in MMA because he blends it well with mixed martial arts as opposed to like Matsumoto in the fight prior kind of stuck in his Muay Thai ways

claims.claim: Matsumoto's Muay Thai-heavy style creates flaws in his stand-up, specifically making him slower and less powerful with his punching.
claims.quote: it just creates some flaws in the stand-up. You'll be a lot slower with your punching. You'll be less powerful with your punching

claims.claim: Danil Donchenko has an elusive Muay Thai striking style.
claims.quote: nasty elbows, very clean and a more elusive Muay Thai striking style

claims.claim: Theodor Børg Gran has never been knocked out as a professional.
claims.quote: He's never been knocked out as a pro

claims.claim: Theodor Børg Gran has never fought a violent striker like Danil Donchenko.
claims.quote: he's also never fought a violent striker like this. I mean, this is a rather serious jump in uh competition.

claims.claim: Sergei Pavlovich is a terrifying force to be reckoned with in the heavyweight division.
claims.quote: Sergei Pavlovich is a terrifying force to be reckoned with. And I don't blame anybody for not wanting to fight Sergei Pavlovich, dude. He is a literal [ __ ] monster.

claims.claim: Conall O'Flaherty possesses a significant grappling advantage over Javier Reyes.
claims.quote: Conall O'Flaherty is coming in with a grappling advantage

claims.claim: Conall O'Flaherty has a massive deficiency in his striking ability.
claims.quote: Conall O'Flaherty is coming in with a grappling advantage, but with a massive deficiency in striking.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes is a significantly better boxer than Conall O'Flaherty.
claims.quote: What I do know is Javier Reyes is way better at boxing.

claims.claim: Conall O'Flaherty's back control is highly effective.
claims.quote: Back control is nasty.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes is a high-volume pressure fighter with good cardio.
claims.quote: Reyes is a good pressure fighter. Reyes is a good volume puncher... He's got good cardio

claims.claim: Conall O'Flaherty's striking is mid-tier and lacks a stand-up threat.
claims.quote: I really think that Kana O'Malley's striking is rather mid. And I don't feel he brings much of a stand-up threat to Reyes.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes has flawed striking defense.
claims.quote: he's a bit flawed in some of his striking defense.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes is a better striker than Yair.
claims.quote: I think Reyes is a better striker than Yair.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes has a career record of 23 wins and 5 losses.
claims.quote: He's 23 and five.

claims.claim: Javier Reyes has 11 career wins by knockout and 8 by submission.
claims.quote: Historically, if you look at Reyes' fighting career, he has 11 wins by knockout with eight submission wins.

claims.claim: Nursultan Ruziboev is a 47-fight MMA veteran.
claims.quote: Ruziboev's 47-fight MMA veteran.

claims.claim: Nursultan Ruziboev has 20 professional wins by submission.
claims.quote: He's got a shitload of wins by submission. What does he got? 20 wins by sub as a pro?

claims.claim: Nursultan Ruziboev is undefeated in the UFC at 185 pounds.
claims.quote: he's undefeated in the UFC at 185.

claims.claim: Andre Pulyaev has a shallow professional resume.
claims.quote: he doesn't really have a very deep resume, Andre Pulyaev.

claims.claim: Andre Pulyaev is relatively durable with decent MMA defense.
claims.quote: seems to be relatively durable, has decent MMA defense

claims.claim: The fight between Ruziboev and Pulyaev is highly likely to go over 1.5 rounds.
claims.quote: I think the fight going over one and a half is incredibly likely.

claims.claim: Julius Walker's striking is basic and wild with his hooks.
claims.quote: his striking is pretty basic. Uh a little bit wild with his hooks, a little bit awkward on the feet.

claims.claim: Abdul-Rakhman Yakiyev has a boxing and grappling advantage over Julius Walker.
claims.quote: I feel like Yakiyev boxing advantage with more power, grappling edge, you got to favor the Chechen, submission threat.

claims.claim: Palayev displayed great IQ and durability against Gaethje.
claims.quote: Palayev displayed great IQ and durability against Gaethje.

claims.claim: Abdul-Rakhman Yakiyev has a boxing advantage and more power than Julius Walker.
claims.quote: I feel like Yakiyev boxing advantage with more power

claims.claim: Abdul-Rakhman Yakiyev has a grappling edge and submission threat over Julius Walker.
claims.quote: grappling edge, you got to favor the Chechen, submission threat.

claims.claim: Abdul-Rakhman Yakiyev has secured submissions in his past two wins.
claims.quote: he has five submissions and his past two wins, he's gotten subs.

claims.claim: Farman Hassanov is likely using performance-enhancing drugs.
claims.quote: he's probably allowed the juice in Baku, true. He might be on steroids

claims.claim: Eric Nolan has knockout power.
claims.quote: I would rather stand on the side of Noland who's got knockout power

claims.claim: Farman Hassanov lacks a well-documented high-level wrestling background.
claims.quote: He doesn't have a well-documented high-level wrestling game.

claims.quote: I would rather stand on the side of Noland who's got knockout power

claims.claim: Eric Noland has the ability to defend against grappling attempts.

claims.quote: He doesn't have a well-documented high-level wrestling game.

claims.quote: whose best win was against a two and two fighter.

claims.claim: Avus Magomedov is mentally fragile and tends to fall apart when fights go poorly.
claims.quote: I think Avus Magomedov melt melts mentally in fights.

claims.claim: Avus Magomedov has suspect cardio and is essentially a one-round fighter.
claims.quote: Very suspect cardio. I don't feel like he has the most dog in him... I feel like Avus Magomedov is a one-round guy

claims.claim: Mykola Olijchuk has dangerous striking and performs well in the second and third rounds.
claims.quote: his hands are dangerous. And I feel like Olijchuk is coming on strong in the second and third, throwing big shots.

claims.claim: Ikram Aliskerov's chin is unreliable and will be tested by Bruno Ferreira's striking.
claims.quote: I really think Aliskerov's chin is going to get put to the test. I'm doubtful of Aliskerov's durability, dude.

claims.claim: Bruno Ferreira has a high-level grappling background with a black belt in jiu-jitsu and judo experience.
claims.quote: Bruno Ferreira's ground game is good. He's a black belt in jiu-jitsu. He has got a judo background.

claims.claim: Ikram Aliskerov is overrated and not an elite-caliber fighter.
claims.quote: I think Aliskerov is a little bit overrated, bro.

claims.claim: Ikram Aliskerov is stiff on the feet and struggles if he cannot secure takedowns.
claims.quote: he's a little stiff on the feet and if he can't get you down, I feel like he's going to get his clock [ __ ] cleaned, bro.

claims.claim: Asu Almabaev is a craftier wrestler than Bruno Silva.
claims.quote: Little bit craftier than Bruno Silva, little bit better at wrestling

claims.claim: Charles Johnson struggles when fighting other veterans.
claims.quote: if he's an underdog against a striker, I like his chances or a prospect, but against vets, fellow vets, I don't like it. It's fellow vets. He tends to sell.

claims.claim: Matheus Camilo has suspect cardio and struggles in the later stages of a fight.
claims.quote: Camilo has good wrestling and good jiu-jitsu, but his cardio is suspect and I question him in the later stage of the fight.

claims.claim: Nazim Sadykhov possesses powerful boxing and fast hands.
claims.quote: His boxing is powerful. His hands are fast.

claims.claim: Michel Pereira has looked washed and performed poorly in his recent fights.
claims.quote: Michel Pereira, who looks washed to me. He's been looking like trash as of late.

claims.claim: Shara Bullet is a tactical kickboxer who utilizes distance management and counter-sniping rather than high-pressure volume.
claims.quote: Shara Bullet style is more of a patient kickboxing flow. He's not an all gas, no brakes pressure fighter. He's a tactical kickboxer from range.

claims.claim: Shara Bullet's patient, counter-striking style makes a first-round knockout less likely than a later-round finish.
claims.quote: Especially because his style is patience first.

claims.claim: Shara Bullet utilizes a patient kickboxing flow rather than an all-gas pressure style.
claims.quote: Shara Bullet style is more of a patient kickboxing flow. He's not an all gas, no brakes pressure fighter.

claims.claim: Michel Pereira has been looking slow in his recent performances.
claims.quote: most especially a guy that's been looking slow as [ __ ]

claims.claim: Shara Bullet is not a submission-oriented fighter.
claims.quote: Shara is not submitting Michel Pereira. Shara no submission ace.

claims.claim: Manuel Torres possesses significant knockout power.
claims.quote: He hits like a [ __ ] truck.

claims.claim: Rafael Fiziev is showing signs of physical decline.
claims.quote: I think Fiziev's showing the slow down signs, man.

claims.claim: Manuel Torres has an underappreciated grappling game.
claims.quote: I think Torres underappreciated grappling, potentially big shots into an engagement on the floor.

claims.claim: Rafael Fiziev struggles to counter-snipe against taller opponents due to his shorter reach.
claims.quote: I feel like Fiziev struggles to find that same type of punch cuz he's 5-ft 8. Torres is a lot bigger than him.

claims.claim: Rafael Fiziev is coming off a recent knockout loss.
claims.quote: And just getting knocked out recently not the best for him.

claims.claim: Rafael Fiziev is coming off a knockout loss to Mauricio Ruffy.
claims.quote: Fiziev's last fight was a knockout loss to Mauricio Ruffi.

claims.claim: Zabit Magomedsharipov's brother should win his upcoming fight.
claims.quote: Zabit's little bro should win.

claims.claim: Ewing is a bad matchup for Torres.
claims.quote: I just think it's a bad match up against [ __ ] Manhoef Torres.

claims.claim: Torres is a heavy-handed fighter.
claims.quote: Torres is a [ __ ] gunslinging savage. And I know Torres is a heavy handed beast, bro.

claims.claim: Isbulayev is not a proven talent yet.
claims.quote: Isbulayev not proven yet. Good talent, but not proven, you know.

claims.claim: A.J. McKee has fought a high level of competition.
claims.quote: McKee's fought a who's who.
